title: The Power of Small Consistent Savings

segments.text: Small savings can lead to massive wealth over time.
And here's a surprising fact about saving.
The wealthy regularly save a percentage, not just a sum.
They understand the compound effect of consistent saving.
That's why they build wealth through steady habits.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Consistency in saving seeds the wealth tree. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 💰
